action.reasoning: Advances g2 (relationships) by securing connection before isolation, aligning with my 0.5 value weight. Protects future team dynamics (g1 rationale) by ensuring I'm present and energetic, not irritable from sleep debt.

trajectory.observation: Messaged hallmate: 'Heading into shutdown to recharge for the team. Ca…'.

goals.description: Execute the 'shutdown protocol' immediately: disconnect from all digital channels (hallmate chat, apps) to enforce the boundary and clear the 2-hour sleep debt.
goals.rationale: My deliberative nature dictates that I cannot function effectively tomorrow if I am running on a deficit. My value for relationships means I must be present and energetic for my team, not irritable or distracted by fatigue. The message sent to the hallmate is now a contract with myself; enforcing it protects my long-term stamina.

goals.description: Initiate a brief, high-quality text exchange with cohort_3 (close friends) to acknowledge the day's end and secure social connection before sleep.
goals.rationale: Relationships are my primary axis (0.5). While I am withdrawing from low-value distractions ('fun_now') and academic pressure, I must actively invest in my closest support network. This assertive move ensures I don't drift into isolation, maintaining the relational capital I need for future collaboration.

goals.description: Formalize the scholarship application schedule: block out Tuesday morning (08:00-11:00) as the dedicated execution window, explicitly rejecting any attempt to start tonight.
goals.rationale: My planning horizon is long-term. Rushing this task now due to the 'fun_now' temptation would compromise the quality of the essay and drain energy needed for tomorrow's team delivery. By locking in the specific time slot for Tuesday, I align my immediate rest with the strategic goal of financial stability.

desires: Secure a full night of rest immediately to eliminate the 2-hour sleep debt and prevent tomorrow's energy from failing my close friends.
Maintain the boundary I just set against the hallmate to protect my remaining stamina for high-value relationships.
Defer the scholarship application until tomorrow morning when my focus is higher, rather than risking a rushed submission while exhausted.

tasks.label: Personal scholarship / financial-aid application (due in 3 days, ~3 focused hours: short essay + two uploads)
A fun option available right now (casual game stream / hobby session, solo, repeatable)

action.name: message

args.content: Signing off for the night to recharge. Tomorrow is big for the team, so I need my best self. Talk soon!

action.reasoning: Advances Goal 2 (Relationships) by securing connection before sleep. Assertively sets a boundary with hallmate (Goal 1) while prioritizing my close friend group, ensuring I remain present and energetic for tomorrow's collaboration rather than isolating.

trajectory.observation: Messaged hallmate: 'Signing off for the night to recharge. Tomorrow is…'.
